message:
Include in_progress issues in ready results and sort oldest-first within priority tiers

Change the ready query to treat in_progress the same as open, making
work-in-progress items visible to br ready so agents can see tasks they
have already started. Switch Hybrid and Priority sort tiebreakers from
created_at DESC to ASC so older issues within a priority tier surface
first (FIFO ordering). Add test for orphan child counter rebuild safety.
Update ready test suite to match new inclusion and ordering semantics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
